Subject:	Enron Energy Marketing Corp. - Withdrawal of Qualification in Indiana

Enron Energy Marketing Corp. (87C-ENEM)

We have been requested by EES to file for the withdrawal of the above company's qualification to conduct business in the State of Indiana.  If you are aware of any reason NOT to withdraw from this state, please let me know by Thursday, August 30, 2001.

Should we receive no objection, we will proceed to file for the withdrawal.
